# Glyphic

> Glyphic is a visual editor for Mermaid diagrams. Build, animate, compare, and share architecture diagrams without leaving your browser.

## Getting Started
- [Getting Started](/docs/getting-started)
- [Installation](/docs/getting-started/installation)
- [Quickstart](/docs/getting-started/quickstart)
- [Your First Project](/docs/getting-started/your-first-project)

## Guides
- [Animations and Transitions](/docs/guides/animations-and-transitions)
- [Core Concepts](/docs/guides/core-concepts)
- [Deploying Your Work](/docs/guides/deploying-your-work)
- [Guides](/docs/guides)
- [Working with the Editor](/docs/guides/working-with-the-editor)

- [Authentication](/docs/api-reference/authentication)

- [Welcome to Glyphic](/docs)
